title: dendranthema × ogawae
intro: Dendranthema × ogawae, also known as Japanese chamomile, is a hybrid of the Dendranthema grandiflorum and the Dendranthema lavandulifolium plants. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for soothing skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Japanese chamomile include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Japanese chamomile is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by infusing the flowers in hot water or using them in a carrier oil for skin care applications.
